creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
there's no brazilian portuguese version of the "GEOM: Modular Disk Transformation Framework" handbook chapter (doc/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/geom.html) available to people who needs to read it in your native language.

Fix: 

checkout/export the brazilian portuguese freebsd doc. project subversion repository content to get the translated file (chapter.xml):

bash$ REPO="http://freebsd-doc-br.googlecode.com/svn/trunk"
bash$ svn export $REPO/docs/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/geom/chapter.xml
How-To-Repeat: en_US? http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/geom.html
pt_BR? http://www.freebsd.org/doc/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/geom.html
